guide.title: Study Room Guide
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know here!
guide.videoAudioDesc: Toggle your microphone and camera using the bottom control bar.
guide.videoAudioTip: Keep muted when not speaking to reduce background noise.
guide.whiteboardDesc: Click the pencil icon to switch to collaborative whiteboard mode.
guide.whiteboardTip: Draw, add text, and shapes. Everyone sees changes in real-time.
guide.chatResourcesDesc: Use Chat for messages and Resources to share study materials.
guide.chatResourcesTip: Upload PDFs (20MB) and images (5MB) to share with the room.
guide.timerDesc: Sessions run for 25 minutes using the Pomodoro technique.
guide.timerTip: You'll get warnings at 5 min and 1 min remaining.
guide.todoDesc: Track your personal tasks in the sidebar To-Do tab.
guide.todoTip: Private to you and stored for the current session only.
guide.musicDesc: Play focus music privately—only you can hear it.
guide.musicTip: Volume auto-lowers when your mic is active.
guide.proTipDesc: Use full screen mode for immersive focus sessions, and respect the 25-minute focus blocks for maximum productivity.

q1.scenario: When solving a complex problem at work/school, you prefer to:
q1.o1: Analyze data and conduct research to find the logical answer.
q1.o2: Brainstorm creative, out-of-the-box solutions with no limits.
q1.o3: Organize the team and delegate tasks to get it done efficiently.

q2.scenario: Ideally, your workspace would look like:
q2.o1: A workshop with tools, machines, or outdoor equipment.
q2.o2: A quiet, well-organized office with clear filing systems.
q2.o3: A bustling collaborative space where you can help people.

q3.scenario: You have a deadline approaching. Your approach is to:
q3.o1: Execute a strategic, detailed plan to ensure everything runs perfectly.
q3.o2: Dive in hands-on and just start building/fixing it immediately.
q3.o3: Rely on your intuition and flow, improvising as you go.

q4.scenario: Which role appeals to you most in a group project?
q4.o1: The Negotiator: Persuading others and selling the group's idea.
q4.o2: The Helper: ensuring everyone feels included and supported.
q4.o3: The Scientist: Fact-checking and ensuring technical accuracy.

q5.scenario: You feel most accomplished when you have:
q5.o1: Built or repaired something tangible with your hands.
q5.o2: Taught someone a new skill or helped them through a tough time.
q5.o3: Successfully led a team to achieve a high-revenue goal.

q6.scenario: If you had to write a book, it would likely be:
q6.o1: A technical manual or a non-fiction analysis of a complex topic.
q6.o2: An expressive novel, poetry collection, or screenplay.
q6.o3: A guide on productivity, data management, or accounting.

q7.scenario: It's a free Saturday. You are most likely to do:
q7.o1: Go hiking, fix a car, or do woodworking.
q7.o2: Visit an art gallery or attend a concert.
q7.o3: Optimize your personal finances or organize your digital life.

q8.scenario: You want to learn a new skill. You pick:
q8.o2: Counseling or first aid to assist others.

q9.scenario: Pick a TV show to watch:
q9.o1: Documentaries about science, nature, or history.
q9.o2: Reality shows about business competitions or politics.
q9.o3: Talk shows or dramas focused on relationships and people.

q10.scenario: You are at a bookstore. You head straight for the section on:

q11.scenario: You're planning a vacation. Your style is:
q11.o1: No fixed plan, just exploring culture and taking photos.
q11.o2: A group tour where you can meet locals and other travelers.
q11.o3: A meticulously planned itinerary with spreadsheets.

q12.scenario: If you won the lottery, you would:
q12.o1: Start your own company or invest aggressively.
q12.o2: Buy a farm/workshop and work with machines/animals.
q12.o3: Fund a research lab to solve global mysteries.

q13.scenario: In a conversation, you enjoy talking about:
q13.o1: Abstract ideas, feelings, and artistic expression.

q14.o1: The Problem Solver who fixes things.
q14.o2: The Intellectual who knows a lot of facts.
q14.o3: The Empath who is always there to listen.

q15.scenario: What matters most to you in a career?
q15.o1: Prestige, status, and the ability to influence others.
q15.o3: Making a difference in people's lives directly.

q16.scenario: You see a complex machine. You wonder:
q16.o2: How can I operate it? (Hands-on usage)
q16.o3: How can this simplify my filing system? (Efficiency)

q17.scenario: You are asked to give a presentation. You focus on:
q17.o1: Inspiring the audience emotionally with visuals.
q17.o2: Persuading them to take a specific action or buy in.
q17.o3: Sharing accurate research findings and data.

q20.scenario: A software update changes your workflow. You:
q20.o1: Immediately read the documentation to understand the logic.
q20.o2: Make sure records are updated and compliant with new rules.
q20.o3: Ask colleagues how they feel about the change.

q21.scenario: Which high school subject did you (or would you) prefer?

q22.scenario: You need to organize a party. You take charge of:
q22.o1: Creating the guest list and managing the budget.
q22.o2: Making sure everyone is having a good time.
q22.o3: Setting up the lights, sound system, and decorations.

q23.scenario: You encounter a theory that contradicts your beliefs. You:
q23.o1: Research it deeply to see if it makes logical sense.
q23.o2: Debate the person to prove your point of view.
q23.o3: Use it as inspiration for a story or artwork.

q24.o1: Running a small bed & breakfast or consulting firm.
q24.o2: Cataloging your massive collection of something.
q24.o3: Living in a cabin, fishing, and fixing things.

q25.scenario: You have to work on a team. What frustrates you most?
q25.o1: Lack of specific instructions or disorganized workflows.
q25.o2: Restrictions on creativity and rigid rules.
q25.o3: People being insensitive or unkind to each other.

q26.scenario: You fit best in a role where:
q26.o1: You are the expert analyzing complex problems.
q26.o2: You are the boss making high-stakes decisions.
q26.o3: You are the artisan creating something unique.

q27.scenario: If you could intern anywhere for a week, you'd choose:
q27.o1: A busy hospital ER helping patients.
q27.o3: A major accounting firm during tax season.

q28.scenario: You are buying a computer. You care most about:
q28.o1: The specs, processor speed, and technical benchmarks.
q28.o2: The aesthetics, design, and screen quality for art.
q28.o3: The brand prestige and resale value.

q29.scenario: A friend comes to you with a problem. You:
q29.o1: Listen empathetically and offer emotional support.
q29.o3: Analyze the root cause of why it happened.

q30.scenario: At a networking event, you are:
q30.o1: Working the room, exchanging cards, and making deals.
q30.o2: Talking to one person deeply about their life story.
q30.o3: Standing back, observing the dynamics, or checking the schedule.

q31.scenario: You're assigned a project with vague instructions. You:
q31.o1: Love it! It's a blank canvas for my ideas.
q31.o2: Hate it. I need clear guidelines and expectations.
q31.o3: Research similar projects to determine the best approach.

q32.o1: A non-profit dedicated to community health.
q32.o3: A marketing agency with high growth potential.

q33.scenario: You perform best when you are:
q33.o2: Working with your hands and tools.
q33.o3: Working with data, numbers, and details.

q34.scenario: Which word best describes your ideal self?

q36.scenario: Final Question: If you had to pick a uniform, you'd choose:
q36.o1: A suit or professional business attire.
q36.o3: Clothing that reflects my personality, creativity, or mood.

relatedCourses.title: Education Pathways

hero.title: Redefin
hero.subtitle: Discover your true potential with our personality insights, explore course and career pathways, and collaborate in virtual study rooms.

personality.title: Deep Personality Analysis
personality.description: Go beyond surface-level traits. Our scientific assessment uses the Holland Code (RIASEC) model to map your interests to real-world career paths. Discover your true potential.

hub.title: Interactive Infographic Hub
hub.description: Navigation, not just analysis. Visualize the connections between skills, courses and careers. Trace the pathways from your current studies to your dream job.

rooms.title: Virtual Study Rooms
rooms.description: Immerse yourself in a focused digital environment. Join live study rooms with lofi beats, pomodoro timers, and motivated peers.

ai.title: Ethical AI Companion
ai.description: Your intelligent guide, not just a search engine. Engineered with validated educational frameworks to ensure relevance and minimize hallucinations.

security.title: Enterprise-Grade Privacy
security.description: We employ end-to-end encryption. Your psychological profile is yours alone.

common.confirmSignup:
Join In-Aspired to access this feature!

Would you like to sign up now?

hero.title: Empowering Futures,
hero.subtitle: One student at a time.
hero.description: In-Aspired bridges the gap between ambition and reality. We provide the tools, data, and community you need to make informed decisions about your future.

letter.title: A Letter from our Founders
letter.subtitle: A personal note on why we started this journey
letter.p1: We started In-Aspired because we've lived it. We remember the paralyzing anxiety of choosing the wrong future.
letter.p2: The pressure to "have it all figured out" at 18 isn't just stressful. It's unrealistic. We saw a generation of brilliant minds lost in choices that didn't fit their DNA.

origin.text: That is why we're named In-Aspired.

letter.p3: In-Aspired isn't just a tech platform. It's the guide we wish we had. A way to look into the Psychological Mirror and see your path clearly before you take the first step.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe every student deserves a clear path to success. By combining advanced personality analysis with a vast database of educational resources, we help you discover not just a career, but a calling.

chronicle.title: Our Chronicle
chronicle.subtitle: From a shared frustration to a global platform. Here is how we built the future.

milestones.title: The Vision
milestones.desc: Identifying the 'lost generation' problem and the gap in career guidance.

milestones.title: The Foundation
milestones.desc: Building the core RIASEC matching engine and Python microservice architecture.

milestones.title: The Shift
milestones.desc: Launching virtual study rooms to foster collaborative discovery.

milestones.title: The Tech
milestones.desc: Introducing AI-driven psych profiling and our 24/7 student companion.

selfDiscovery.title: Self Discovery
selfDiscovery.desc: Start your journey with our free RIASEC personality quiz. For a complete deep-dive, unlock our detailed Premium Report.

knowledgeHub.title: Knowledge Hub
knowledgeHub.desc: Access a comprehensive database of courses and careers. Search, filter, and get detailed insights on institutions offerings and details.

studyRooms.title: Virtual Study Rooms
studyRooms.desc: Collaborate with peers in personalized study rooms. Distinct collaborative tools like whiteboards and pomodoro timers help you stay focused and productive.

aiCompanion.title: AI Companion
aiCompanion.desc: Get 24/7 support. Our AI chatbot is always ready to answer your questions about courses and career prospects, as well as system information.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.caption: Building the future of education with technology and heart.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.description: At In-Aspired, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data.

content.text1: In-Aspired is the data controller responsible for the collection and processing of your personal data under this Privacy Policy. We operate in Malaysia and process personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA).
content.text2: If you have questions about this policy or our data practices, you may contact us at privacy@in-aspired.com.

content.text1: When you create an account, we collect your name, email address, and password. If you take our personality assessments, we store your responses and results to provide personalized career recommendations.
content.text2: We automatically collect information about how you interact with our platform, including pages visited, features used, time spent on the site, and your device information (browser type, operating system, IP address).
content.text3: We use cookies and similar technologies to remember your preferences, maintain your session, and analyze how our services are used. You can control cookie settings through your browser.
content.text4: We do not intentionally collect sensitive personal data such as government-issued identification numbers, financial information, or health data unless explicitly required and with your consent.

content.text1: We use your information to provide, maintain, and improve our services, including personalized career recommendations, study room features, and AI-powered assistance.
content.text2: We may send you service-related emails, updates about new features, and educational content. You can opt out of non-essential communications at any time.
content.text3: We analyze usage patterns to understand how users interact with In-Aspired, helping us improve our platform and develop new features.

content.text1: We process your personal data based on your consent when you create an account, use our services, or agree to receive communications from us.
content.text2: Certain data processing is necessary to perform our services, including providing personalized recommendations and maintaining your account.
content.text3: We may process personal data where it is necessary for our legitimate interests, such as improving our platform, ensuring security, and preventing misuse.

content.text1: We may share data with trusted third-party services that help us operate our platform (hosting, analytics, email services). These providers are bound by strict confidentiality agreements.
content.text2: We may disclose your information if required by law, court order, or government request, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of In-Aspired and our users.
content.text3: We will share your personal information with other parties only when we have your explicit consent to do so.
content.text4: Some of our service providers may process data outside Malaysia. Where personal data is transferred internationally, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place to protect your information in accordance with applicable laws.

content.text1: All data transmitted between your device and our servers is encrypted using industry-standard TLS/SSL protocols. We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect personal data both in transit and at rest.
content.text2: We implement strict access controls to ensure only authorized personnel can access user data. All access is logged and monitored.
content.text3: We conduct regular security audits and vulnerability assessments to identify and address potential security risks.

content.text1: You have the right to access your personal data and request a copy in a portable format. Contact us to request your data export.
content.text2: You can update your personal information through your account settings. You may also request deletion of your account and associated data.
content.text3: You can opt out of marketing communications, disable cookies, and control how your data is used through your privacy settings.

content.text1: Our services are not intended for children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us so we can take appropriate action.
We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your personal data will be removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
content.text2: Aggregated, anonymized analytics data may be retained indefinitely for research and improvement purposes.

content.text1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal requirements. When we make material changes, we will notify users through the platform or via email.

contact.title: Questions About Your Privacy?
contact.description: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please don't hesitate to contact us.

pdpa.title: PDPA Compliance
pdpa.description: This privacy policy is designed to comply with Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (PDPA). We are committed to ensuring that your personal data is processed in accordance with the principles outlined in the Act.

hero.title: Terms of Service
hero.description: Please read these terms carefully before using In-Aspired. By using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.

content.text1: By accessing or using In-Aspired's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
content.text2: By using our services, you also agree to the collection and processing of your data as outlined in our Privacy Policy.
content.text3: We reserve the right to update these Terms at any time. Any significant changes will be communicated via email or through notifications on our platform. Continued use of the services after any changes implies acceptance of the updated Terms.

content.text1: You must be at least 13 years of age to use In-Aspired. If you are under 18, you must have parental or guardian consent to use our services.
content.text2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

content.text1: Our RIASEC-based personality assessments are designed to provide educational guidance. Results are recommendations based on scientific models and should not be considered as professional career counseling.
content.text2: Our AI-powered features provide information and suggestions based on available data. While we strive for accuracy, AI responses should be verified independently for critical decisions.
content.text3: Our virtual study rooms are collaborative spaces. You agree to use them respectfully and not engage in any disruptive or inappropriate behavior.

content.text1: When using In-Aspired, you agree NOT to:
list: Use the service for any unlawful purpose or in violation of any laws
Harass, abuse, or harm other users
Share inappropriate, offensive, or harmful content
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
Use automated systems or bots without permission
Impersonate others or provide false information
Interfere with or disrupt the service

content.text1: All content on In-Aspired, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of In-Aspired or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws.
content.text2: You retain ownership of content you create on our platform. By posting content, you grant us a non-exclusive license to use, display, and distribute it in connection with our services.
content.text3: Any feedback, suggestions, or ideas you provide may be used by us without any obligation to compensate you.

content.text1: Our career recommendations and educational content are provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee specific outcomes, employment, or academic success.
content.text2: We strive to maintain high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We may modify, suspend, or discontinue features at any time.
content.text3: While we strive to provide accurate information, users are responsible for verifying any critical decisions or actions based on the recommendations or content provided by our platform. In-Aspired is not liable for any consequences arising from decisions made using our services.
content.text4: To the maximum extent permitted by law, In-Aspired shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.

content.text1: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including breach of these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the service will cease immediately.
content.text2: You may delete your account at any time through your account settings. Some information may be retained as required by law or for legitimate business purposes.

governing_law.title: Governing Law
governing_law.description: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Malaysia, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be resolved in the courts of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

help.title: Frequently Asked Questions
help.subtitle: Quick answers to questions you may have about In-Aspired.
help.noResults: No questions found matching your search.
help.cantFindAnswer: Can't find the answer you're looking for? Please chat to our friendly team.

faqs.question: How do I create an account?
faqs.answer: Click the "Sign Up" button in the top right corner, fill in your email, name, and password, then verify your email address. It takes less than 2 minutes!

faqs.question: Is In-Aspired free to use?
faqs.answer: Yes! All core features including the RIASEC personality quiz, Virtual Study Rooms, and basic career matching are completely free. For students who want a deep-dive, we offer a "Premium Insights Report", a personalized career roadmap just for RM9.99 (About the price of a milk tea!).

faqs.question: What information do I need to provide?
faqs.answer: Just your email, name, and a password. We may ask for basic educational background (like your current form) to personalize recommendations, but it's optional.

faqs.question: Can I use In-Aspired on my phone?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! In-Aspired is fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices. You can take tests, browse courses, and join study sessions from your phone or tablet.

faqs.question: Do I need my parents' permission to sign up?
faqs.answer: If you're under 18, it's best to let your parents know you're using In-Aspired. While we don't require parental approval, we encourage transparency with your family about your career planning.

faqs.question: Do I need to download anything?
faqs.answer: No downloads needed! In-Aspired works directly in your web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, etc.). Just visit the website and start exploring.

faqs.question: What if I forget my password?
faqs.answer: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page. We'll send a reset link to your email. Make sure to check your spam folder if you don't see it within a few minutes.

faqs.question: Can I share my account with friends?
faqs.answer: We recommend each person has their own account for personalized test results and recommendations. Sharing accounts can mix up your personality profiles and career suggestions.

faqs.question: How does the personality assessment work?
faqs.answer: Our assessment is based on the Holland Code (RIASEC) model, a scientifically validated framework used worldwide. We analyze your responses to map your interests to six personality types: Realistic, Investigative, Artistic, Social, Enterprising, and Conventional.

faqs.question: How long does the personality test take?
faqs.answer: The test typically takes 10 minutes to complete. You can save your progress and continue later if you need a break.

faqs.question: Can I retake the personality test?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can retake the test whenever you want! Your interests may evolve as you grow, so feel free to retake it anytime to see how your profile changes.

faqs.question: How accurate is the personality assessment?
faqs.answer: Our test is based on established psychological models and has an 85% accuracy rate based on user feedback. Remember, it's a guide to help you explore options, not a definitive answer!

faqs.question: What if I'm unsure about some questions?
faqs.answer: Just answer based on your gut feeling! There are no right or wrong answers. If you really can't decide, think about what you naturally enjoy or what feels less stressful to you.

faqs.question: Will my test results be shared with anyone?
faqs.answer: No, never! Your test results are completely private and encrypted. We don't share them with schools, parents, or anyone else without your explicit permission.

faqs.question: What does RIASEC even mean?
faqs.answer: RIASEC stands for the six personality types: Realistic (hands-on), Investigative (thinker), Artistic (creative), Social (people-person), Enterprising (leader), and Conventional (organizer). Most people have a combination of 2-3 types!

faqs.question: What if I don't like my results?
faqs.answer: Your results are suggestions based on your answers, not a life sentence! Use them as a starting point to explore, but you're not locked into those careers. Many successful people work outside their "type."

faqs.question: What if I get the same score for multiple types?
faqs.answer: That's actually common! It means you have a balanced personality with interests in multiple areas. We'll show you careers that combine those interests, giving you more options to explore.

faqs.question: Can I skip questions I don't understand?
faqs.answer: You should try to answer all questions for the most accurate result, but if a question really doesn't make sense to you, pick the option that feels closest to your preference.

faqs.question: How is this different from BuzzFeed quizzes?
faqs.answer: Great question! Our test is based on decades of psychology research (Holland Code) used by career counselors worldwide. BuzzFeed quizzes are fun but not scientifically validated for career planning.

faqs.question: Will this tell me exactly which course to take?
faqs.answer: Not exactly – it gives you a range of suitable careers and courses that match your interests. Think of it as a compass pointing you in the right direction, not a GPS with one specific route!

faqs.question: How do I search for courses?
faqs.answer: Use the search bar on the Courses page! You can filter by domain/field of study, education level (Foundation, Diploma, General Pre-U), cost, and institution type (Public/Private). Try keywords like "engineering" or "business" to get started.

faqs.question: Can I filter courses by budget/cost?
faqs.answer: Yes! We categorize courses by cost levels: Low (< RM 20k), Medium (RM 20k - 50k), and High (> RM 50k). Filter by your budget to find affordable options.

faqs.question: What's the difference between Diploma and Degree?
faqs.answer: A Diploma is usually 2-3 years and focuses on practical skills. A Degree (Bachelor's) is 3-4 years with more theory and research. Diplomas are faster and cheaper, while Degrees often lead to higher-paying jobs.

faqs.question: Which courses don't require strong science/maths?
faqs.answer: Many options! Arts, Business, Media, Social Sciences, Hospitality, and Design courses typically focus less on science/maths. Use filters to find courses matching your SPM subjects.

faqs.question: What education levels are covered?
faqs.answer: We cover Foundation, Diploma, Pre-U and (A-Levels, STPM, Matrix, IB). Currently, degree programs are not supported. We aim to support your transition from SPM all the way into university.

faqs.question: How do I know which university is reputable?
faqs.answer: Check if the course is MQA (Malaysian Qualifications Agency) accredited – we show this in course details. Also look at our "Trusted Partners" list which includes well-established universities.

faqs.question: What are the entry requirements for each course?
faqs.answer: Click on any course to see detailed requirements like minimum SPM grades, required subjects, and interview processes. Requirements vary by institution.

faqs.question: Can I save courses I'm interested in?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can now preserve courses and careers to your dashboard. Simply click the 'Save' or 'Heart' icon on any course or career card to keep them for future reference.

faqs.question: Do you show career salary ranges?
faqs.answer: Yes! Most career pages include estimated salary ranges (low to high) based on Malaysian market data. Keep in mind salaries vary by experience, location, and company size.

faqs.question: How often is course information updated?
faqs.answer: We refresh our database quarterly by pulling data from university portals and official sources. If you notice outdated info, please contact us!

faqs.question: Can I compare courses from different universities?
faqs.answer: Currently, you'll need to open courses in separate tabs to compare. We're working on a side-by-side comparison feature!

faqs.question: What if I don't know what I want to study yet?
faqs.answer: That's totally normal! Take our personality test first to discover your interests, then browse suggested courses. You can also explore by broad fields like "Arts," "Science," or "Business."

faqs.question: How can I join a study room?
faqs.answer: Navigate to the "Virtual Study Rooms" section from the navbar. Browse active rooms, click one that interests you, and hit "Join." No account needed for public rooms!

faqs.question: Are there rules for the study rooms?
faqs.answer: Yes! To keep everyone focused: no harassment, no spam. Hosts can control camera, audio, and whiteboard permissions. Public rooms are open to all, while Private rooms require a join code.

faqs.question: What if I'm shy to turn on my camera?
faqs.answer: No worries! Cameras are optional in all rooms. Many students prefer to study with video off – do whatever makes you comfortable.

faqs.question: Can I study alone in a private room?
faqs.answer: Yes! Create your own room and set it to "Private." You can study solo or invite specific friends via a link.

faqs.question: What happens if someone is being disruptive?
faqs.answer: Room hosts can mute or remove disruptive members. If you're experiencing harassment, leave the room and report it to us via the Contact page.

faqs.question: Can I invite specific friends to my room?
faqs.answer: Yes! When you create a room, you get a shareable link. Send it to friends via WhatsApp, Telegram, or any messaging app.

faqs.question: Is there a time limit for study sessions?
faqs.answer: Nope! Study for as long as you want. Rooms stay active as long as someone is in them.

faqs.question: What's a pomodoro timer?
faqs.answer: It's a study technique: work for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break. After 4 cycles, take a longer break. Our rooms have built-in timers to help you stay focused!

faqs.question: Can I use the whiteboard?
faqs.answer: Yes! The whiteboard lets you draw, write, and create shapes. The host can toggle it between read-only and editable mode for participants.

faqs.question: What if my internet connection is slow?
faqs.answer: Turn off your camera to save bandwidth. Study rooms use minimal data for chat and timers, so even slower connections should work fine.

faqs.question: Can I listen to music while studying?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have a built-in personal music player with multiple radio stations: Lofi Girl, Chillhop Raccoon and more. It features autoplay to keep the vibes going.

faqs.question: Will others hear my music?
faqs.answer: No, the music player is completely personal. Only you can hear it, so you won't disturb other study room members.

faqs.question: Does the music stop when I talk?
faqs.answer: We have a smart "mic ducking" feature that automatically lowers the music volume to 10% when your microphone is active, so you can speak clearly.

faqs.question: Can I track my study tasks?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Use the personal To-Do list in the sidebar to add, check off, and delete tasks. It includes a progress bar to keep you motivated.

faqs.question: Is my to-do list saved?
faqs.answer: Your to-do list is session-based and private (only visible to you). It resets when you close the room to protect your privacy on shared devices.

faqs.question: Are there rooms for specific subjects?
faqs.answer: Yes! Many students create subject-specific rooms like "Add Maths Study Group" or "Biology SPM Prep." Check room titles when browsing.

faqs.question: What is the AI chatbot?
faqs.answer: Our AI chatbot is your 24/7 study buddy! It can answer questions about courses, careers, the platform, and help guide your career exploration journey.

faqs.question: Can the chatbot help me with homework?
faqs.answer: The chatbot is designed for career and course guidance, not homework help. It can suggest study resources or explain concepts related to career paths, but won't do your assignments!

faqs.question: How smart is the AI assistant?
faqs.answer: Powered by Google Gemini AI, it's trained on career frameworks and our course database. It's very good at career advice but not perfect – think of it as a helpful guide, not a human counselor.

faqs.question: Will it understand if I type in Bahasa Malaysia?
faqs.answer: Yes! The AI can understand and respond in both English and Bahasa Malaysia. Just type in the language you're comfortable with.

faqs.question: What questions can I ask the chatbot?
faqs.answer: Ask about career paths, course requirements, university info, platform features, personality test results, salary expectations, and more. Try: "What careers match my artistic interests?"

faqs.question: Is the chatbot available 24/7?
faqs.answer: Yes! Unlike human counselors, the AI is always online. Ask questions anytime, even at 3 AM before your SPM exam!

faqs.question: Will the chatbot judge me for asking "dumb" questions?
faqs.answer: Never! There are no dumb questions. The AI is programmed to be supportive and helpful, no matter what you ask. Don't be afraid to explore!

faqs.question: What if the chatbot gives me wrong information?
faqs.answer: While we train it on verified data, AI can occasionally make mistakes. Always double-check important info (like entry requirements) on official university websites or with counselors.

faqs.question: Can I have a conversation history with the chatbot?
faqs.answer: Currently, each chat session is independent (not saved between visits). We're working on adding conversation history in future updates!

faqs.question: Does the chatbot remember what I asked before?
faqs.answer: Within the same session (while your page is open), yes! But if you refresh or close the page, it starts fresh. Your privacy is protected.

faqs.question: Can I ask sensitive questions about career worries?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Your chats are private and not shared. Feel free to discuss career fears, family pressure, or confusion – the AI is here to support you without judgment.

faqs.question: How do I change my password?
faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Security > Change Password. You'll need to enter your current password, then set a new one. Choose something secure!

faqs.question: Is my data private?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use AES-256 encryption (same as banks!) and are PDPA compliant. Your personality profile and data are never shared with third parties without your explicit consent.

faqs.question: Can I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Yes. Go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. Warning: This permanently removes all your test results and saved data. Make sure you really want to before confirming!

faqs.question: What personal information do you collect?
faqs.answer: We collect: email, name, password (encrypted), and optional education details. We don't ask for IC numbers, phone numbers, or sensitive personal data.

faqs.question: Can I use a nickname instead of my real name?
faqs.answer: Yes! You can use any name you're comfortable with. Many students use nicknames for privacy.

faqs.question: Will my test answers be sold to companies?
faqs.answer: Never. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with advertisers or third parties. Your data is for your benefit only.

faqs.question: What does PDPA compliant mean?
faqs.answer: PDPA is Malaysia's Personal Data Protection Act. It means we legally protect your data, only use it for stated purposes, and let you control how it's used.

faqs.question: Can I make my profile private?
faqs.answer: Your profile is already private by default. Only you can see your test results and account info unless you choose to share them.

faqs.question: What happens to my data if I delete my account?
faqs.answer: All your personal data is permanently deleted from our servers within 30 days. We keep minimal anonymized data for statistical purposes only (no way to identify you).

faqs.question: Will colleges see my account activity?
faqs.answer: No. Universities have no access to your In-Aspired account or test results unless you explicitly share them (like forwarding a results screenshot).

faqs.question: Can parents see my test results?
faqs.answer: Not unless you share them! Your account is private. However, we encourage open conversations with parents about your career plans.

faqs.question: The website is loading slowly. What should I do?
faqs.answer: Try refreshing the page, clearing your browser cache, or checking your internet connection. If it persists, the site might be experiencing high traffic – try again in a few minutes.

faqs.question: I can't log in. What's wrong?
faqs.answer: Double-check your email and password for typos. Make sure Caps Lock is off! If you forgot your password, use "Forgot Password" to reset it.

faqs.question: The personality test froze halfway. Did I lose my progress?
faqs.answer: Your progress is auto-saved! Refresh the page and log back in. You should be able to continue from where you left off.

faqs.question: Why can't I join a study room?
faqs.answer: Make sure you're logged in (some rooms require accounts). Check your browser permissions – you might need to allow camera/mic access even if you don't plan to use them.

faqs.question: The chatbot isn't responding. Is it down?
faqs.answer: The AI might be temporarily overloaded. Wait a few seconds and try again. If it still doesn't work, check your internet connection or try refreshing the page.

faqs.question: What browsers are supported?
faqs.answer: In-Aspired works best on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge (latest versions). Older browsers might have compatibility issues.

faqs.question: Can I use In-Aspired offline?
faqs.answer: No, you need an internet connection to use In-Aspired since it pulls live data from our servers. Download study schedules or notes beforehand if you plan to be offline.

faqs.question: I'm getting an error message. Who do I contact?
faqs.answer: Go to the Contact page and describe the error. Include a screenshot if possible! We typically respond within 24-48 hours.

faqs.question: The page layout looks broken on my phone.
faqs.answer: Try rotating your phone or zooming out. If it still looks wrong, let us know your device model and browser so we can fix it!

faqs.question: Do I need to install anything?
faqs.answer: Nope! In-Aspired is a web app that runs in your browser. No downloads, no installs, no storage space needed on your device.

faqs.question: Is this platform safe for teenagers?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use enterprise-grade encryption, have strict privacy policies (PDPA compliant), and all content is educational. We don't allow inappropriate content or unsupervised interactions.

faqs.question: Can parents monitor their child's progress?
faqs.answer: Parents don't have direct access to student accounts to protect privacy, but we encourage students to share their test results and discuss career plans with family.

faqs.question: Can schools get bulk access for students?
faqs.answer: Yes! Contact us via the Contact page to discuss partnership options for schools. We offer special programs for educational institutions.

faqs.question: What age group is this designed for?
faqs.answer: Primarily Form 4-6 students (ages 16-18) preparing for SPM and university applications, but useful for anyone exploring career options.

faqs.question: Are there any inappropriate content filters?
faqs.answer: Yes. We moderate user-generated content in study rooms and have reporting systems. Our AI is programmed to refuse inappropriate requests.

faqs.question: How accurate is the career guidance compared to school counselors?
faqs.answer: In-Aspired is a supplement, not a replacement, for professional counselors. We provide data-driven suggestions; counselors offer personalized, context-aware advice. Best used together!

desc.R: Practical & Hands-on. Loves working with tools, machines, plants, or animals.
desc.I: Analytical & Curious. Loves studying, solving math or science problems.
desc.A: Expressive & Creative. Loves art, drama, music, or writing.
desc.S: Helpful & Friendly. Loves teaching, nursing, or giving first aid.
desc.E: Ambitious & Persuasive. Loves leading people and selling ideas.
desc.C: Organized & Detail-oriented. Loves working with numbers or records.

cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, provide personalized content, and analyze our traffic. You can choose to accept all cookies, only necessary cookies, or customize your preferences.

chatbot.welcome: Hi there! 👋 I'm here to help you navigate your career path. Ask me anything about courses, institutions, careers, or the personality test!
